blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Add evidence for override option functionality
Verify that preferred clients can see full availability through the override option.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of showing full availability to preferred clients, but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case mentions the override option but lacks concrete evidence of its existence or functionality in the system. Therefore, there is a clear gap in meeting the requirement as no evidence was provided to demonstrate that preferred clients can indeed see full availability.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the override option for preferred clients.
